series_description: The Board receives verification of education and criminal record report results to support application requirements.
retention_statement: Microform: 14 days from the time the electronic file is provided to the board ; Paper: no paper files are retained in the office. all paper transcripts are uploaded to the electronic system. ; Electronic: Retain in licensing and document management system for a period of one year. After that period of time the records may be destroyed.
disposition: Microform: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete

series_description: Transcripts and documents that were submitted by applicants who never completed licensure application process.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper transcripts will be scanned into the electronic record of the applicant. The electronic record will be maintained for a period of 1 year after the date the application was submitted. ; Electronic: The electronic record will be maintained for a period of 1 year after the date the application was submitted.

series_description: General application documents, excluding official transcripts
retention_statement: Paper: No paper files are retained in the office they are scanned into the electronic system and ; Electronic: Retain in licensing system for a period of seven years.

series_description: Original application files for applications for a certificate, license, or endorsement but were denied by the Board. Includes initial applications, renewal, and restoration/reinstatement applications, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: 4 years - For denied applications, retain electronic medium, or physical file if it was not scanned, for a period of 4 years from date of final appeal; then, shred physical file. ; Electronic: 4 years - For denied applications, retain electronic medium for a period of 4 years from date of final appeal; then, delete electronic medium.

series_description: Dismissed Action: ethics grievance not certified to a formal action; Grievance received; unconditionally dismissed.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year - For unconditional dismissals, retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 1 year from the date of dismissal; then, shred physical file. ; Electronic: 1 year - For unconditional dismissals, retain electronic medium for a period of 1 year from the date of dismissal; then, delete electronic medium.

series_description: Dismissed Action: ethics grievance not certified to a formal action; Grievance received; conditionally dismissed and not reopened.
retention_statement: Electronic: 5 years - For conditional dismissals, retain electronic medium for a period of 5 years from the date of dismissal; then, delete electronic medium. (This does not apply to a conditional dismissal that is reopened.) ; Paper: 5 years - For conditional dismissals, retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 5 years from the date of dismissal; then, shred physical file. (This does not apply to a conditional dismissal that is reopened.)

series_description: Formal Actions: ethics grievance certified to action; Files containing information pertaining to formal actions against licensees, which include copies of Board Orders, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, appellate decisions and entries, probationary modifications, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: 10 years - Retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 10 years from the date of final appeal; then, shred physical file. ; Electronic: 10 years - Retain electronic medium for a period of 10 years from the date of final appeal; then, delete electronic medium.

series_title: BCI-FBI background checks as part of application documents
series_description: Official background checks to support application requirements.
